# Masyu (Non-unique)

A regular [Masyu](https://puzz.link/rules.html?mashu) that isn't quite unique - draw only the line segments that factually must be drawn.

Click to solve on Penpa+.
[![Click to solve on Penpa+](../../images/puzzles/2025/masyu3.png)](https://swaroopg92.github.io/penpa-edit/#m=solve&&)
